items.title: Roy man accused of shooting friend in head while doing quick draw drills
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
items.dek: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.
items.body: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Noma head chef resigns from restaurant amid abuse allegations
items.dek: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.
items.body: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.
items.author: IriLine Desk
